diagnoses.name: Acute kidney failure, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: presenting with acute kidney failure of unspecified etiology

diagnoses.name: Dysuria
diagnoses.evidence_span: endorsed dysuria and frequency

diagnoses.name: Urinary tract infection, site not specified
diagnoses.evidence_span: urinary tract infection. Labs revealed elevated BUN and creatinine with hematuria noted on UA. Urinalysis cultures were obtained and grew organisms consistent with urinary tract infection.

diagnoses.name: Hypovolemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Upon admission, the pt presented with signs of hypovolemia and acute kidney injury

diagnoses.name: Chronic lymphocytic leukemia of B-cell type not having achieved remission
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic lymphocytic leukemia of B-cell type not in remission

diagnoses.name: Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation
diagnoses.evidence_span: paroxysmal atrial fibrillation managed on anticoagulation

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic polyneuropathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: his type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic polyneuropathy and insulin dependence

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic coronary artery disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic coronary artery disease s/p angioplasty implant

diagnoses.name: Sick sinus syndrome
diagnoses.evidence_span: a pacemaker for sick sinus syndrome

diagnoses.name: Prior cerebral infarction with left-sided hemiparesis
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior cerebral infarction with resulting left-sided hemiparesis

diagnoses.name: Morbid obesity s/p bariatric surgery
diagnoses.evidence_span: morbid obesity s/p bariatric surgery

diagnoses.name: Obstructive sleep apnea
diagnoses.evidence_span: obstructive sleep apnea

diagnoses.evidence_span: hypothyroidism

diagnoses.name: Anxiety disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: anxiety disorder

diagnoses.name: Major depressive disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: major depressive disorder

diagnoses.name: Thrombocytopenia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Complete blood count trending was followed given thrombocytopenia and iron deficiency anemia documented on admission

diagnoses.name: Iron deficiency anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: thrombocytopenia and iron deficiency anemia documented on admission

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: atorvastatin 80 mg for his hyperlipidemia

diagnoses.name: Gout
diagnoses.evidence_span: allopurinol 100 mg for gout management

diagnoses.name: Chronic pain
diagnoses.evidence_span: For his chronic pain, acetaminophen 500 mg was employed when appropriate

diagnoses.name: Gastrojejunal ulcer
diagnoses.evidence_span: Given his history of gastrojejunal ulcer

diagnoses.name: Urinary retention
diagnoses.evidence_span: Given his history of gastrojejunal ulcer and urinary retention

procedures.name: IV hydration with 0.9% sodium chloride and lactated Ringers
procedures.evidence_span: The patient was treated with IV hydration using 0.9% sodium chloride and lactated Ringers to address the hypovolemia component.

procedures.name: Urinalysis
procedures.evidence_span: Labs revealed elevated BUN and creatinine with hematuria noted on UA. Urinalysis cultures were obtained

procedures.name: Pacemaker management
procedures.evidence_span: a pacemaker for sick sinus syndrome
